segments.text: At that time Jesus went on the sabbath day through the corn; and his disciples were an hungred, and began to pluck the ears of corn, and to eat.
But when the Pharisees saw it,
Behold, thy disciples do that which is not lawful to do upon the sabbath day.
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: But he said unto them,
And when he was departed thence, he went into their synagogue:
And, behold, there was a man which had his hand withered.
Is it lawful to heal on the sabbath days?
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: And he said unto them,
Then saith he to the man,
And he stretched it forth; and it was restored whole, like as the other.
Then the Pharisees went out, and held a council against him, how they might destroy him.
But when Jesus knew it, he withdrew himself from thence: and great multitudes followed him, and he healed them all;
And charged them that they should not make him known:
That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Esaias the prophet, saying,
Behold my servant, whom I have chosen; my beloved, in whom my soul is well pleased: I will put my spirit upon him, and he shall shew judgment to the Gentiles.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: He shall not strive, nor cry; neither shall any man hear his voice in the streets.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: A bruised reed shall he not break, and smoking flax shall he not quench, till he send forth judgment unto victory.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: And in his name shall the Gentiles trust.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Then was brought unto him one possessed with a devil, blind, and dumb: and he healed him, insomuch that the blind and dumb both spake and saw.
Is not this the son of David?
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: This fellow doth not cast out devils, but by Beelzebub the prince of the devils.
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: And Jesus knew their thoughts, and said unto them,
Master, we would see a sign from thee.
segments.speaker: Scribes and Pharisees

segments.text: But he answered and said unto them,
While he yet talked to the people, behold, his mother and his brethren stood without, desiring to speak with him.
Behold, thy mother and thy brethren stand without, desiring to speak with thee.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But he answered and said unto him that told him,
And he stretched forth his hand toward his disciples, and said,
